title: Vonage Message Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for Vonage Messages API.

message.description: A message sent through the Vonage Messages API.

message_uuid.description: Unique message identifier returned after send.

text.description: Message text. Required for text messages.

image.description: Image payload with url and optional caption.

video.description: Video payload with url and optional caption.

file.description: File payload with url, name, and optional caption.

client_ref.description: Optional client reference for tracking (max 100 chars).

message_status.description: Webhook payload for message status updates.
